title: Strategic Goal Setting for IT Capacity Planning
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of establishing and aligning capacity goals with business objectives.
relationships: Business Objectives inform and are translated into Defined Capacity Goals by IT Stakeholders
The Current IT Capacity Baseline is measured against the Defined Capacity Goals to identify gaps
Success Metrics (KPIs) are defined to quantitatively measure progress towards the goals
A Feedback Loop ensures goals are continuously reviewed and refined based on performance data and changing Business Objectives
